tasks.subject: Task 1: Add .feature-unit CSS primitive system
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce new unified-card CSS appended to src/app.css, inert (new classes unused in markup yet).

**Files:** src/app.css (append at EOF)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .feature-unit / .unit-head / .sub-list / .sub-session + state modifiers defined
- npm run build passes
- npm run test -- --run passes
- No visual change yet

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run test -- --run`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/app.css"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && npm run test -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["new .feature-unit classes defined","build passes","tests pass","no visual change yet"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Restructure Sidebar markup to use .feature-unit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace per-feature render block (Sidebar.svelte:882-1011) with .feature-unit card containing .unit-head + optional .sub-list with .sub-session rows. Preserve all existing behavior.

**Files:** src/lib/components/Sidebar.svelte:882-1011

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Feature without sessions = single .feature-unit with only .unit-head
- Feature with sessions = .feature-unit with .unit-head + .sub-list (dashed divider visible)
- Session state → correct modifier (running/waiting/viewing/exited)
- .feature-unit--has-viewing when any terminal matches viewingTerminalId AND feature not selected
- Pinned glyph before title; tree chevron + pmb + sessions badge in .unit-head__right
- Click .unit-head → onSelect / requestShowOverview (existing logic)
- Click .sub-session → onSelectTerminal; click .sub-session__finish → onFinishTerminal + stopPropagation
- Drag + context menu still work
- npm run build + tests + visual QA via npm run tauri dev

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run test -- --run && npm run tauri dev`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/components/Sidebar.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && npm run test -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["cards render","sub-list with divider","session state modifiers","has-viewing modifier","pinned glyph","chevron","click handlers preserved","drag preserved","context menu preserved","build passes","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Remove legacy feature-item + feature-session CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete all unused CSS blocks for the old flat-row + tree-connector system.

**Files:** src/app.css (delete 3 ranges)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All .feature-item* rules removed EXCEPT wrapper/drag-drop classes
- .feature-item-wrapper.feature-item-drop-child retargeted to > .feature-unit
- All .feature-session-* rules removed
- @keyframes pulse-amber preserved
- .list-row / .list-row--active preserved
- Grep in src/ returns zero references to old classes (aside from wrapper-drag)
- npm run build + tests pass

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run test -- --run`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/app.css"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && npm run test -- --run","acceptanceCriteria":["legacy blocks deleted","wrapper drag rules preserved","pulse-amber keyframes preserved","list-row preserved","drop-child retargeted to .feature-unit","build passes","tests pass","grep shows zero old-class references"]}
```
